action.description:
Introduced by Senators Roys, L. Johnson, Dassler-Alfheim, Drake, Hesselbein, Larson, Ratcliff, Spreitzer, Wall and Wirch; 
cosponsored by Representatives Bare, Fitzgerald, J. Jacobson, Anderson, Arney, Clancy, DeSmidt, Doyle, Goodwin, Joers, Johnson, Mayadev, McCarville, Miresse, Neubauer, Palmeri, Prado, Rivera-Wagner, Roe, Sinicki, Snodgrass, Spaude, Taylor, Udell, Vining and Stubbs
